summary: The Alley Boss and his allies are searching for Cruz Mountain among three remaining candidates while coordinating with other major guilds to defeat the Alley Boss. Despite concerns from team members regarding his bold strategies and rapid rise to power, the Alley Boss proves his combat prowess and begins organizing the groups for the sixth main scenario. As they prepare to depart, the Alley Boss consolidates his team, including the arrival of Guildmaster Anthony, to initiate their next strategic phase.
key_moments: The Alley Boss narrows down the location of Cruz Mountain to three possible candidates.
Major guilds decide to split teams to confront the Alley Boss, while the Alley Boss forms his own party.
The Alley Boss successfully defeats a Legion Ant Soldier Captain and begins organizing his team for the sixth main scenario.
